title: How small businesses can leverage AI
optimized_headline: Unlocking AI: 5 Ways Small Businesses Can Gain a Competitive Edge

From accounting to design to market research and product development, there’s a staggering breadth of skills needed to run a business. A large company can hire experts to…
raw_body: This article is from Making AI Work, MIT Technology Review’s limited-run newsletter examining how to apply LLMs across industries. To receive it in your inbox,sign up here. From accounting to design to market research and product development, there’s a staggering breadth of skills needed to run a business. A large company can hire experts to…
speedrun: Small businesses can harness AI to streamline operations across various tasks, from accounting to design. By leveraging AI tools, these businesses can save time and reduce costs, allowing them to compete more effectively. For instance, AI can automate routine tasks, freeing up valuable resources for strategic initiatives. This shift is crucial now, as small businesses face increasing pressure to innovate and adapt in a rapidly changing market.
why_it_matters: Small business owners could improve efficiency and reduce operational costs, enabling them to focus on growth and customer engagement.
The growing adoption of AI tools among small businesses could signal a shift in competitive dynamics, leveling the playing field with larger companies.

lenses.eli12: Small businesses can use AI like a helpful assistant that takes care of repetitive tasks, making life easier. For example, AI can handle bookkeeping or design work, letting owners focus on what they love. This matters because it helps small businesses thrive in a tough economy by making them more efficient.
lenses.pm: For product managers, the integration of AI in small businesses highlights a growing user need for affordable, efficient tools. By reducing manual workload, these AI solutions could lower costs and improve productivity. This shift could lead to new opportunities for product development aimed at small business needs.
lenses.engineer: From a technical perspective, small businesses can implement AI models that automate various tasks, using tools like natural language processing for customer service or data analysis. These applications can significantly enhance efficiency, with potential cost savings of up to 30% in operational expenses. However, businesses must ensure they choose the right models to fit their specific needs.
